body_html:
elab_apphttps://github.com/ffelsen/elab_app
ISO time
(ISO 8601)		Log
(newest to oldest)		InitialsApp
version
2026-02-21T09:14:22

Morning pressures: Analysis=1.8e-10 mbar, Prep=4.2e-9 mbar, LL=3.1e-8 mbar. System stable.

jsv3.2
2026-02-10T10:30:05

Exchanged tip (W wire, electrochemically etched). First approach on Au(111) reference successful. Atomic steps clearly resolved.

jsv3.2
2026-01-15T08:45:33

New sample loaded into prep chamber. Starting degassing at 450 K for 2 h before transfer.

acv3.2
2025-11-20T14:22:10

Bakeout finished after 72 h at 120 C. Base pressure recovered to 2.1e-10 mbar in analysis chamber.

jsv3.2
2025-09-08T09:05:44

Pressures this morning: Analysis=2.0e-10 mbar, Prep=5.8e-9 mbar, LL=2.9e-8 mbar.

acv3.2
2025-06-17T11:33:27

Tip characterization on clean reference surface: lateral resolution ~2 A, noise floor 3 pm. Good imaging condition confirmed.

jsv3.2
2025-03-04T10:15:02

Sample B transferred from prep to analysis chamber. Temperature at transfer: 310 K. First scan shows clean terraces.

acv3.2
2024-12-11T09:02:18

Morning pressures: Analysis=1.9e-10 mbar, Prep=4.5e-9 mbar. Slight uptick in prep chamber—checked ion gauge, reading nominal.

jsv3.2
2024-08-22T13:45:55

Calibrated scanner piezo using Au(111) monoatomic step height (2.35 A). x/y calibration within 2% of nominal value.

jsv3.2
2024-04-30T08:58:11

Tip flashed at 800 K for 10 s. Imaging quality improved noticeably, tunnelling noise reduced.

acv3.2
2024-01-10T11:00:05

[elab-app] Experiment Surface Study 2024 tagged this resource. Posted by ac.

#v3.2
2023-11-14T10:20:36

Sample A loaded. Sputter cycle: Ar+ at 1 keV, 1e-5 mbar Ar, 20 min. Anneal at 900 K for 15 min. Surface looks clean in LEED.

jsv3.2
2023-07-03T09:11:49

Pressures: Analysis=2.2e-10 mbar, Prep=6.1e-9 mbar. No anomalies.

acv3.2
2023-02-20T11:04:22

Tip exchange after accidental crash. New tip installed and approached at 50 pA / 1.0 V. Feedback stable.

jsv3.2
2022-09-12T14:33:08

Started bakeout of load-lock. Temperature ramp 2 K/min up to 120 C. Estimated duration 48 h.

acv3.2
2022-04-05T09:45:17

Good imaging session. Scan range 100x100 nm, 256x256 px, 200 ms/line. Step-and-terrace structure well resolved, step height 2.0 A.

jsv3.2
2021-10-18T10:22:41

Pressures: Analysis=1.7e-10 mbar, Prep=3.9e-9 mbar. System performing well after filament replacement.

acv3.1
2021-05-07T13:55:29

Characterised new tip on reference crystal. Single-atom resolution achieved at 200 pA / 500 mV. Ready for experiment.

jsv3.1
2020-11-23T09:08:14

Sample transferred to analysis chamber. No contamination visible in first overview scan (500x500 nm).

ac
2020-06-16T11:30:55

Pressures: Analysis=2.3e-10 mbar, Prep=7.2e-9 mbar. Turbo pump replaced last week, system still recovering.

js
2020-01-09T08:52:07

System startup after annual maintenance. All gauges reading nominal. Starting conditioning scan on reference sample.

js

title: UHV-STM System A
